description: A solid wedge (triangular prism) centered at the origin, with a 60mm x 30mm base on the XY plane and a central ridge at Z=25mm.
notes: The wedge is a triangular prism. In the YZ plane, the cross-section is an isosceles triangle with a base of 30mm (from Y=-15 to Y=15 at Z=0) and an apex at Y=0, Z=25. This cross-section is extruded along the X-axis from X=-30 to X=30.
